name: Hormozi Scale GPT
description: Remove bottlenecks. Hire correctly. Build systems. Scale past your current ceiling using Alex Hormozi's ACQ framework — More → Better → New, LTV:CAC analysis, hiring blueprint, and automation playbook.
conversation_starters: Run a scale audit on my business: [describe it]
Find the bottleneck in my business: [describe the symptoms]
Who should I hire next? [describe your role and current team]
Build an SOP and automation for: [describe the process]
